data.title: G20 Watchdog Sounds Alarm: Privacy Rules Are Handcuffing Global Crypto Oversight
data.description:
The G20's Financial Stability Board reports that the conflict between global crypto oversight and privacy rules is hindering supervision, as data protection laws prevent effective cross-border monitoring.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/g20-watchdog-sounds-alarm-privacy-rules-are-handcuffing-global-crypto-oversight/

data.title: Tempo, Stripe’s new blockchain, hits $5B valuation in $500M funding round
data.description:
Led by Thrive Capital and Greenoaks, the raise comes less than two months after Stripe unveiled its layer-1 blockchain for stablecoin and real-world payments.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tempo-stripe-blockchain-5b-valuation-funding-round?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto crash deepens with new $1.2 billion liquidations – Bitcoin, Ether, and XRP hit the hardest
data.description:
The crypto market just got smoked again, but everyone saw it coming… just perhaps not this fast. Over the past 24 hours, exchanges have confirmed roughly $1. 20 billion in forced liquidations after a sudden correction crushed over-leveraged traders. Bitcoin took the biggest hit, losing $432. 35 million worth of long positions before Ethereum followed with $269. 51 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-crash-deepens-with-new-1-2-billion-liquidations-bitcoin-ether-and-xrp-hit-the-hardest/

data.title: Solana Meme Economy: The Culture That Drives Billions In Volume – Here’s How
data.description:
Solana meme economy has evolved into one of the most explosive forces in crypto, and the community is now moving billions in daily trading volume. The culture surrounding SOL’s meme coins has become a foundational driver of its network activity, liquidity, and overall market dominance in decentralized exchange (DEX) trading. How Meme Liquidity Fuels Solana’s Growth Crypto analyst known as BagCalls on X has pointed out that the memecoin menia and Degen energy culture of Solana is what defines the project. This is where the project SolsticeFi steps in, and it’s building a native stablecoin and yield infrastructure designed to anchor the ecosystem
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-meme-economy/

data.title: OpenSea Reinvents Itself as Crypto Aggregator Amid 90% NFT Volume Crash
data.description:
Amid a severe NFT market downturn, OpenSea has changed its business model to a crypto trading aggregator across 22 blockchains, although its trading volume reached a 3-year high in October.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/opensea-reinvents-itself-as-crypto-aggregator-amid-90-nft-volume-crash/

data.title: Russia Tops Europe in Crypto Adoption With $376.3B in Transfers – What’s Driving the Surge?
data.description:
A new report has found Russia tops Europe in crypto adoption, recording $376. 3 billion in transfers fueled by institutional investment, DeFi expansion, and the use of stablecoins for cross-border payments.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russia-tops-europe-in-crypto-adoption-with-376-3b-in-transfers-whats-driving-the-surge/

data.title: Crypto Titans Join Trump’s White House Fundraiser for $250M Ballroom Project
data.description:
US President Donald Trump brought together some of the most influential names in crypto at a White House fundraiser this week. Coinbase, Ripple, Tether, and the Winklevoss twins prominently represented the industry.   The gala unveiled plans for a massive new ballroom at the presidential residence, part of Trump’s privately funded expansion efforts. Guests were invited to contribute to the construction project
source: https://beincrypto.com/crypto-titans-join-trumps-white-house-fundraiser-for-250m-ballroom-project/

data.title: Tempo Secures $500 Million Series A Led by Greenoaks
data.description:
Payment-focused Tempo raises $500M, reaching a $5B valuation, backed by Stripe and Paradigm, led by Greenoaks and Thrive.
source: https://coincu.com/news/tempo-secures-500m-funding-round/

data.title: Gold Price Hits New All-Time High At $4400, Market Cap Tops $30 Trillion
data.description:
Key Insights: Gold made history this week after its total market value climbed to an unprecedented $30 trillion, the highest ever recorded for any asset. According to experts, the surge resulted from investor confidence, fueled by persistent inflation fears, global economic uncertainty, and rising demand from central banks.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/17/gold-price-hits-new-all-time-high-at-4400-market-cap-tops-30-trillion/

data.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq, and the Dow close green as Oracle crashes by 7% amid AI target doubts
data.description:

This brutal reversal came even as the S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow Jones Industrial Average all finished the day solidly […]
